title: dracocephalum fragrans
intro: Dracocephalum fragrans, also known as Fragrant Dragonhead, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant have been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and inflammation, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dracocephalum fragrans include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although modern preparations may also include essential oil extracts.
